message:
fix(test): Fix misleading streaming index test names and add edge case test

- Rename test_streaming_enabled_by_default to test_streaming_enabled_when_var_set_to_1
  (the original test was setting the var, not testing default behavior)
- Replace duplicate test with test_streaming_enabled_with_non_zero_value
  (tests that "yes" or any non-"0" value enables streaming)
- Fix comments to accurately describe what each test does

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
